report.summary: UX audit and polish of 7 recently modified ecosystem pages — added metadata+OG images to 4 pages, fixed accessibility (ARIA labels, semantic HTML), improved mobile responsiveness (fluid grids, clamp typography), added FAQ sections, fixed dead links, and added related content internal links.

sections.title: UX Audit
items: Audited 7 recently modified pages: Yearn, EigenLayer, Hyperliquid, Babylon Protocol, Token, Usual, Odos
Found 5 pages missing metadata/OG images (Yearn, Babylon, Token, Usual, Odos)
Found accessibility gaps: missing ARIA labels on step circles, breadcrumbs lacking nav semantics
Found mobile issues: grid minmax too wide (200px), hero padding excessive, font sizes not fluid
Found dead links (#) on Yearn and Babylon Learn More sections
Found Odos chart section misplaced below footer navigation

sections.title: Metadata & OG Images Added
items: OG image: Yearn Finance — Yield Optimizer Guide 2026 (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image: Babylon Protocol — Bitcoin Staking Guide 2026 (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image: Usual Money — USD0 Stablecoin Guide 2026 (1200x630 via /api/og)
OG image: Odos — Multi-Input DEX Aggregator Guide 2026 (1200x630 via /api/og)

sections.title: Accessibility Improvements
items: Added nav aria-label=Breadcrumb to all 4 refactored pages
Added aria-current=page to active breadcrumb items
Changed step numbers to semantic ol/li with aria-hidden on decorative circles
Added role=img with aria-label to emoji decorative elements
Step headings now include Step N: prefix for screen reader context

sections.title: Mobile Responsiveness
items: Reduced stat grid minmax from 200px to 140px (Yearn, Babylon) and 150px to 120px (Usual, Odos)
Added clamp() fluid typography for h1: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 2.8rem)
Added clamp() to stat values: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 1.8rem)
Reduced hero padding from 60px to 48px

sections.title: Content & UX Improvements
items: Added FAQ sections: Yearn (4), Babylon (4), Usual (3), Odos (3)
Added Related Protocols section with linked cards to all 4 pages
Fixed dead links on Yearn (real URLs) and Babylon (internal links)
Moved Odos chart above footer navigation
Removed dangerouslySetInnerHTML from Odos
Split use-client pages into server+client pattern for metadata export
